message:
chore(tests): update performance test artifact baselines

Refresh JSONL test fixtures for performance benchmarks to reflect
current behavior and thresholds:
- degradation_under_load.jsonl: expanded test scenarios
- long_conversation.jsonl: updated conversation flow baselines
- long_conversation_responsiveness.jsonl: minor threshold adjustment
- memory_pressure.jsonl: updated pressure simulation data
- streaming_with_history.jsonl: expanded streaming scenarios

These are test data files consumed by performance regression tests;
the changes ensure the tests exercise current code paths accurately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
